'''Makrin City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Shelkonwa]]. It billed itself as the '''Second City of Spires''', a reference to ancient [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It contained the [[Nightowk Repository]] and a [[Shelkonwa governor's palace|governor's palace]]. [[Farfarn District]] was an area of the city.

It had three [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]: [[Makrin Main Spaceport]], [[Greencliff Regional Spaceport]], and the palace port. All of the city spaceports were shut down in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] by [[Vilim Disra]] in a failed [[Skirmish on Shelkonwa|attempt]] to capture [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] and give her to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
